behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names the test file path, the directories .continue/agents/ and .continue/checks/, the Set-based seen deduplication, and required test cases.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes what to fix but not exact code; the agent must locate resolveReviews.ts and implement the logic.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: test_agents_and_checks_deduplication requires literal 'seen' and 'Set' substrings in source, forbidding valid alternative dedup approaches (e.g., Map, filter with includes, or different variable name).

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: test_resolveReviews_vitest runs the vitest suite which imports and calls resolveReviews; other tests also execute eslint and vitest subprocesses.

test_not_tautological.reason: The vitest behavioral test asserts discovery from both dirs and dedup precedence, which a stub cannot satisfy.

behavior_in_tests.reason: All four required unit test cases plus dedup precedence, both-directory scan, and doc comment update are covered.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests have descriptive names, docstrings labeling fail_to_pass vs pass_to_pass.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction points at review discovery logic domain without naming exact line numbers.
